data.name: Centaureissi

weaponImprint.name: Maid's Rules
weaponImprint.trait: After healing, the user recovers 2 points of stability. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time per turn.
weaponImprint.effect: When healing with active skills, if the target's stability is less than 1/2/3/4/4/4 point(s), restores an additional 2 points of stability to them. This can trigger at most 1/1/1/1/1/2 time(s) per turn. When the user's stability is full, healing and damage dealt is increased by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%/40%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Paradeus by 2.5%. If using a skill with a Phase Element, increase it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A humble yet principled Doll. She brews aromatic coffee and stands as the steadfast guardian of the café - She is the irreplaceable shield of "Zucchero".

skills.name: Cleaning Time
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Maid's Duty
skills.description:
At the start of the battle, gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].

When the user is under the effects of [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]: Increases damage dealt by 20%. When healing, additionally heals 10% of the user's max HP. After active attacks, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns.

When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, prioritize performing 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to them, and applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] to the allied unit. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].

When the user is under the effects of [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]: Increases damage dealt by 20%. When healing, additionally heals 10% of the user's max HP. After active attacks, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns.

When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, prioritize performing 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage to them, and applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] to the allied unit for 1 turn, along with [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8]. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].

When self has [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]: Increases healing effect by 20%, increases damage dealt by 40%; when healing, additionally heals 10% of self max HP; after active attacks, applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns. If the healing target has [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], increases healing effect by 50%; if the attack target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases damage dealt by 50%.

When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, prioritize performing 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing 80% of attack as Physical damage and 3 points of stability damage to them, and applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] to the allied unit for 1 turn, along with [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8]. Gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: When [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is triggered, additionally applies [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to the allied unit for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] is active: Increase healing by 20% and damage dealt by 40%. If the healing target has [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], the healing increase is raised to 50%; if the attack target has [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], the damage dealt is increased by 50%.

skills.name: Careful Hospitality
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to them. After attacking, restores HP equal to 100% of attack to the nearest allied target (excluding the user) and gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]. If the enemy target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], heals 1 additional allied target.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to them. After attacking, restores HP equal to 100% of attack to the nearest allied target (excluding the user) and gains [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]. If the enemy target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], heals 1 additional allied target. If the user has [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], gains [effect:5daaf7a7-a831-44dd-9e64-1db0da736e7c].

skills.name: Zucchero's Special Drink
skills.description: Selects 1 allied target within 7 tiles, restoring total HP equal to 150% of attack to the target and all allied units within 3 tiles. The healing is distributed evenly among all targets. Additionally, deals AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack to all enemies within range. If the enemy targets have [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], cleanses 2 of their buffs.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Each allied target restores at least 75% of Centaureissi's attack as HP.

skills.name: Afternoon Tea Break
skills.description: Restores HP equal to 100% of attack to all allies, cleanses 2 debuffs, removes [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3] and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and restores up to 7 points of stability index to the ally with the lowest stability index. After healing, applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Restores HP equal to 100% of attack to all allies, cleanses 3 debuffs, removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and restores up to 7 points of stability index to the ally with the lowest stability index. After healing, applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].
skills.descriptionLevel3: Restores HP equal to 100% of attack to all allies, cleanses 3 debuffs, removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b], and restores up to 8 points of stability index to 2 allies with the lowest stability index. After healing, applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The number of debuffs cleansed increases by 1, and removes [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d], [effect:e82fca4c-de4a-40b6-83c2-e84d716f72d3], [effect:b46e4270-c2d5-4f69-bb9b-544785785790], and [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Restores stability index for 2 allies with the lowest stability, then further increase it by 1 point.

keys.effect: At the end of action, applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] to the closest allied unit without [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]. This effect has a 2-turn cooldown.

At the start of battle and after using the Ultimate Skill Afternoon Tea Break, applies [effect:f6be3959-152e-423c-abef-f97f1cb8a44e] to Centaureissi for 2 rounds.

After using the active skill Zucchero's Special Drink, applies [effect:87d14238-137a-4e76-aa3d-4bafe01847e0] to all allied units for 2 turns.

When Centaureissi performs a Support Attack to cover an attack that deals Burn damage launched by allied units, Centaureissi gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This effect can be triggered up to once per turn.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.

If an allied unit within 7 tiles enter Stability Break after taking damage, removes [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] from self and applies [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] to the allied unit.

When [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] is triggered, randomly cleanses 1 buff from the attack. Before [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe] is triggered, cleanses 2 debuffs from the buff holder(s).
Increase the healing multiplier of the active skill Zucchero's Special Drink by 75%.
When healing an allied target with an active skill, cleanses 1 debuff. For targets with [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], cleanses 1 additional debuff.
When healing an allied target with an active skill, if the target has [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], randomly applies 1 powerful buff to them for 1 turn.

vertebrae.effect: When [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is triggered, additionally applies [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to the allied unit for 1 turn.

doll.name: Centaureissi
doll.effects: A humble yet principled Doll. She brews aromatic coffee and stands as the steadfast guardian of the café - She is the irreplaceable shield of "Zucchero".

imagoforms.effect: Before an allied unit takes fatal damage, they recover HP equal to 8% of max HP. This effect can trigger up to once per turn. In addition, this effect can only trigger once per unit per turn.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
This unit's healing effects are increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: When allied units deal Burn damage, Burn damage dealt is increased by 15%, critical damage of Burn damage is increased by 10%. Cannot be cleansed.
Immune to basic attacks and skill damage. The immunity is removed after receiving 1 basic attack or skill attack. This is considered a buff.
Upon consuming [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe], regain 1 stack of [effect:d5571913-f803-4fc4-b716-d0d2f156dbbe]. Triggers 1 time. This is considered a Burn buff and cannot be cleansed.
